game:handbook-mealrecipe-directionstext-:
1. Put your pot on the firepit and gather up your ingredients. Make sure your liquids are in a bowl.
2. Divide your ingredients equally into the pot by stack size. For liquids, leftmouse-click to place the liquid out of the bowl or rightmouse-click with the bowl to pick it back up.
3. Light the fire and have a bowl or crock ready to scoop out the au gratin when cooked.

2. Divide your ingredients equally into the pot by stack size. For liquids, leftmouse-click to place the liquid out of the bowl or rightmouse-click with the bowl to pick it back up.
3. Light the fire and have a bowl or crock ready to scoop out the compôte when cooked.

1. Put your pot into the lower-left slot of the mixing bowl. Make sure your liquids are in a bowl.
2. Divide your ingredients equally into the pot by stack size. For liquids, leftmouse-click to place the liquid out of the bowl or rightmouse-click with the bowl to pick it back up.
3. Hold rightmouse or power your mixing bowl until the meal is finished being mixed, then remove it from the lower-right slot in the mixing bowl and place it nearby.
4. Use a bowl or crock to scoop out the salad.

game:handbook-mealrecipe-notestext-augra: Typically mixed with vegetables or seafood, the creamy cheese sauce hardens into a browned crust that adds a crunchy roasted flavor to the meal. Cooked alone, the cheese sauce is similar to fondue.
game:handbook-mealrecipe-notestext-compo: A warm, sweet dessert made of fruit in cooked in sugar syrup and occasionally wine. Can also be served chilled.
game:handbook-mealrecipe-notestext-meaty:
An uncooked mixture of vegetables and other foods, salads can fit up to 6 different ingredients as opposed to a cooking pot's 4. However, they do not store for long. Eat them quickly!
NOTE: Any meat added to salads must be cured or cooked first. We wouldn't want to get sick!
game:handbook-mealrecipe-notestext-pasta: Also known as 'pasta salad', a number of ingredients are combined with pre-cooked pasta to produce a fresh and flavorful meal. Cold pasta meals can fit up to 6 different ingredients as opposed to a cooking pot's 4.

Of the 1,000 forms of pasta, this is but one of them.
Of the 1,000,000 variants of pasta meals, all are united in love.
Of the 1,000,000,000 mouths to be fed, a chorus emerges.

NOTE: Hot pasta lasts longer than cold pasta, due to all of the ingredients being cooked together.
game:handbook-mealrecipe-notestext-ricea: Primarily made with rice and cooked in a stock or broth with other ingredients, this dish has as many names as it does grains of rice.
game:handbook-mealrecipe-notestext-yogur: A healthy snack in its own right, enhanced by the addition of more fresh fruit and nuts and topped with syrup or gelatin. Yogurt meals can fit up to 6 different ingredients as opposed to a cooking pot's 4.
